reasoning.research_depth: Solid hands-on testing and research. Demonstrates real hardware knowledge through practical experimentation and benchmarking.
reasoning.signal_noise: Minimal filler with content-focused delivery. Gets to the point efficiently with relevant technical demonstrations.
reasoning.originality: Distinctive approach combining hardware reviews with real-world testing scenarios. The practical, no-nonsense style is recognizable.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Good evergreen potential for hardware and infrastructure content, though specific product reviews may date over time.
